results.rendered_html: pacata (von 1. pac)  UṆĀDIS. 3,110 . adj. gekocht, gar: puroḻāḥ  ṚV. 3,28,2 . n. so v. a. pakti gekochte Speise  NIR. 6,16 . muṣāyadviṣṇuḥ pacatam  ṚV. 1,61,7 . cano dadhiṣva pacatota somam 10,116,8 .  VS. 21,60 . 23,13 .  ŚĀṄKH. BR. 8,21,4 . m. Feuer  UJJVAL.  ausserdem die Sonne und N. Indraʼs  UṆĀDIK. _im_ ŚKDR.

pacata a.
1 Cooked, dressed.
2 Ripe, developed, mature.
— taḥ
1 Fire.
2 The sun.
3 N. of Indra.
— taṃ Cooked food.
Comp.
— bhṛjjatā continual baking and roasting, cf. khādatamodatā.
